reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents list.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260408-000420-gt87" in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded showing landing page for new session.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator confirmed agent is idle, meeting the requirement of "running" or "idle".
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was typed into input field and send button was clicked successfully.
Message was submitted and agent began processing — Agent status changed to "working" with activity indicator showing "Working...".
Waited for account access request card — Card appeared after 13 seconds requesting GitHub account access with checkbox already selected.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Card was processed and agent resumed working.
Waited for API request review card — Card appeared requesting permission for "GET /user" API request from GitHub.
Clicked "Allow" button for API request — Confirmation dialog appeared with options.
Clicked "Allow Once" option — API request was approved and agent completed processing.
Agent responded with GitHub username — Response displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Agent status changed to "idle" after 21 seconds of work.
Captured screenshot showing successful response with GitHub username — Screenshot saved and shows complete conversation history including the username verification result.
